item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact InvestIQs. Send us your questions about investment information or the blog.

item.title: Korean Income Tax Filing Guide: The Dividend Threshold and IRP/ISA Tax Strategy
item.description: English-localized research note on Korean comprehensive income tax filing, the KRW 20 million dividend and interest threshold, IRP and ISA tax credits, penalties, and high-dividend separate taxation.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: Privacy Policy for InvestIQs. Information about cookies, Google AdSense, and analytics usage.

item.title: April 28, 2026 US Market Close: S&P 500 $715.17 +0.00%, Nasdaq +0.00%
item.description: S&P 500 +0.00%, Nasdaq +0.00%, VIX 18.02. Sector leaders XLF, XLC, XLK; laggards XLP, XLRE, XLY.

item.title: April 27, 2026 US Market Intraday: First 30 min S&P 500 +0.07%, Nasdaq -0.09%
item.description: 30-minute intraday snapshot — S&P 500 +0.07%, Nasdaq -0.09%, VIX 19.07. Sector leaders XLV, XLF, XLE; laggards XLK, XLB, XLY.

item.title: Expense Ratio Compounding: 0.03% vs 0.5% Over 30 Years
item.description: Expense ratio compounding model: 0.03% vs 0.5% over 30 years, with live ETF data, peer comparisons, and fee-drag scenarios.

item.title: TQQQ’s 5-Year Drawdown and Volatility Breakdown: Where 3x Lagged 2x
item.description: A research note comparing TQQQ, QLD, and QQQ on five-year returns, drawdown, volatility, dividend yield, and path dependence to test whether 3x leverage really outpaces 2x.

item.title: QQQ vs SPY 10-Year Regression: Tech Concentration vs Diversification
item.description: QQQ vs SPY regression analysis on tech concentration, returns, and yield using exact yfinance data for US investors.

item.title: TQQQ Five-Year Drawdown and Volatility Decomposition: When 3x Trails 2x
item.description: A data-driven look at TQQQ’s five-year drawdown, volatility, and path dependence versus QLD and QQQ, showing why 3x trailed 2x in this window.

item.title: VOO DCA After 12 Months: Real Returns, Mistakes, and SCHD Contrast
item.description: VOO DCA after 12 months: real returns, SCHD comparison, and monthly ETF investing mistakes for U.S. investors.

item.title: About — InvestIQs Research
item.description: About InvestIQs Research — a data-driven platform covering US and global ETFs, dividend assets, and long-term allocation with AI-assisted analysis.
